title: Document library
description: Every primary document the watcher has seen and classified as relevant (site structure item #5): title, date, regulator, type, pillar tags, deep link. A derived, public-safe view of data/ledger.json -- regenerated in full on every watcher run, never accumulated. 'type' is the feed's own 'kind' from config/jurisdiction.json (e.g. press_releases, circulars, speeches) -- a separate vocabulary from card.json's analyst-assigned type enum, since a raw watched document's feed category and an analyst's editorial classification of a drafted card are different concepts. 'regulator' and 'pillar' values are free text governed by config/jurisdiction.json, never enumerated here, to keep this schema jurisdiction-portable.
